feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cache OAuth token using Cache policies in SAP APIM
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a doubt regarding the cache policies and how they can be used for caching the OAuth token. I am working on an API to connect to SuccessFactors and I am using OAuth as the Authentication. Here is the high level overview/ sequence of policies in the Pre-Flow of Target EndPoint

1. KeyValueMapOperations

2. LookUpCache

3. GenerateSAMLAssertion (with policies for encoding)

4. AssignMessage (creating Request before call to get token)

5. ServiceCallOut

6. RaiseFault

7. ExtractVariables (to fetch token and expiry time)

8. PopulateCache

After this I have included "AssignMessage" in the PostFlow to set the Authorization Header before making the call to access the resource. 

This set up is working fine in general, but the consumer of this API has reported that they sometimes get the following error:

[LGN0022]The access token has expired. The token was issued at 4/23/24 8:45 AM and expired at 4/24/24 8:45 AM. Please use the "new_token" parameter to generate a new token.

My understanding is that this issue might be occurring when the token which is used from the cache is expired before the call is made to the Successfactors. But ideally, this should happen only once throughout the duration set by the "TimeoutInSec" parameter of PopulateCache policy. Is this understanding correct?

Also, How does the "TimeoutInSec" parameter works in general. Does its value automatically decrease after after every run of the API? And, should I reduce the value of "expires_in" by 60-90 seconds before setting it in ExpirySettings in Populatecahe policy? Or in general what should be done to avoid the error caused by token expiry?

I am not able to simulate this error as the token is valid for 24 hours and the API works fine without any errors duging the testing, for eg, with POSTMAN. Any help would be appreciated. Thanks!

Regards,

Faisal

entry.title: Moderators Question - about Partner Edge Product Links and Product Placement
entry.content:
Hi SCN Moderators Community,

please would you help me, I am very interested in the SAP Customer's Business value side and SAP Customer's Technical implementation side of Enterprise Blockchain.

Two months ago I began what is planned to be a long journey of bringing SAP and Enterprise Blockchain deep dive blogs to the SCN Community with the goal of stimulating interest and engagement and discussion on this very useful and interesting technology. 

There is so much to the technology and it is so misunderstood I have an ambition to make all of it easy to understand so that my fellow SAP Experts can have a head start on understanding the technology, the business value and most important how to do it in their SAP installations. This was the first blog, https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/why-i-love-sap-and-blockchain-databases-and-why-you-should-too/ba-p/13625869 the current one, the ninth one in the journey is awaiting Moderation Approval due to doubts in links in the content, and the 10th blog is in preparation for publishing.

Before I started blogging, I put the following question in the SCN PartnerEdge Community:

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-business-technology-platform-discussions/sap-partneredge-open-ecosystem-build-partner-blogging-question/td-p/13622535

Nobody ever responded to my question.

And now, as I continue this long journey of elaborating on the technology and use cases I seem to be running in to breaching the rules of Moderation of SCN with links in my blogs.

Obviously, I would like to post comfortably and within the rules and without friction, and hence the question, would somebody please respond to my question in the SCN Partner Edge Community and help to make it clear and transparent for Partner Edge Partners as to what is allowed and what is not. Would you please help that this question gets answered:  https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-business-technology-platform-discussions/sap-partneredge-open-ecosystem-build-partner-blogging-question/td-p/13622535 

Thanks very much for a wonderful community and looking forward to help and guidance and also, clearing the obstacles to get the latest blog which is in Moderation Approval published.

All the best, your old Moderator friend,

Andy Silvey.

entry.title: Overall budget exceeded error VS Annual budget exceeded error
entry.content:
We were just upgraded to S4 on January 1st this year. When we tried to post invoices with SAP function module BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE, sometimes we got the expense exceeded the budget errors. My question is that why sometimes we got the "overall budget exceeded" error and sometimes we got the "annual budget exceeded" errors. What attributes make S4 to check the expense against the overall budget instead of annual budget? Is there a flag in the imported parameters of BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE can make S4 to check the expense against the annual budget instead of overall budget? Thank you in advance for your help!

Fisher Li

entry.title: How to connect Snapengage with SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to get Snapengage chats data into SAC for reporting purposes. Is there a way to connect Snapengage with SAC via connection ?

Please let me know if you've already done this in your organisation.

TIA,

Poornima.

entry.title: Table FIWTIN_ACC_EXEM is not updating in T code MRKO.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Hope You are doing well!

While doing Consignment invoicing in T code MRKO, the withholding tax base amount is not updating in Table FIWTIN_ACC_EXEM. Same issue i have raised to SAP, but there is no localization in T code MRKO. Can anyone suggest how can we achieve the solution or do we need any enhancement/Implicitly or Development.

Your suggestion will be appreciated.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: How to link two P ID which itself a UID
entry.content:
Hi Export,

I am stuck while linking my two P IDs with Universal ID. Both of my P IDs are already separately registered as a Universal ID.

In details.

I have a personal email (P ID) which is registered as a Universal ID (UID). This already has a few valid certifications.

SAP Universal ID 

I have an office email ID (P ID) which is registered as a Universal ID (UID). I am planning to give certification from this ID.

Now when I am trying to link above one account with another account. It's showing an error that your ID is already mapped with another UID.

Please advise me on how to solve this issue.

entry.title: [BUG] Notification feed, doubles when multiple followed tags assigned
entry.content:
Hi,

Just noticed that in the notification feed, when a question has been given multiple tags that I follow, the notification comes on multiple times:

Please note that only one question was posted. It was assigned the SQL and Microsoft SQL Server tags, both of which I follow.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: can we deleted/hide spot award levels
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need some help understanding if we can hide spot award levels from the program and if doing so would have any impact on the program.

Your comments and feedback are much appreciated.

Thank you

entry.title: MI07 stock posted with 703 movement type to physical inventory QI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

i have a 9 stock for one material in quality inspection. it is posted with the movement type 703 in MI07.

now i want to remove the stock completely, i don't want them in our accounting stock because it is not physically present.

can anyone please help me with this by giving proper steps to resolve the issue.

thank you in advance

entry.title: Hello all, I am new here in this community. My goal is to learn SAP with hopes of being a consultant
entry.content: Hello all, I am new here in this community. My goal is to learn SAP with hopes of being a consultant. Please I need guidance and advice on where I should start from and the best route to go. I see there are a lot of courses, and I do not want to waste time on the ones I should not be focusing on. Please help

entry.title: In Interview Assessment Form can we custom the rating scale
entry.content:
Hi All,

In Interview Assessment Form - Can we can the rating scale like LvL1, LvL2+....in spite of 1-5
Could anyone please confirm

Thanks

entry.title: Negative Deduction config changes not impacting on existing Quota record
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need your help!!!

My business requirement it to change Negative deduction field of Annual Quota to -10 days from V_T559L so that Employee can apply for leaves till negative quota balance -10 days. 
I did the change to Neg Ded to field in V_T559L to -10 days effective from 01.06.2024, by delimiting the previous record.

While testing the scenarios I noticed that - 

1. For new hires/next year, it is working fine. I can see -10 days negative deduction in IT2006.

2. For existing employees (for which Annual quota record was already available with previous config of 0 negative deduction in this year 2024), negative deduction -10 days is NOT coming in existing record.

I cannot delete IT2006 annual quota record of all employees as leaves are already taken in this year. Also, cannot change quota end date as system is not allowing.

Could you please help me to solve this? Business wants this new change to be replicated from 01.06.2024 only.

Thank you.

Pratik

entry.title: Table Header Cell coloring in sap.ui.table
entry.content:
Hello All

Our UI5 version is 1.71.55

The requirement is to color the cell of headers. We have multi headers (2 headers). For 1st level header, need to color the cell with different colors. Tried with different options and still color is not reflecting. 

Gave class name directly in Label; but only Label background changes but not the complete cell.

Tried with Vertical Layout option; but again it's full-cell coloring didn't work; also second level header was missing.

Any ideas?

<tab:Column id="id_colexMatCompType" filterProperty="exMatCompType" width="7rem"
                                            headerSpan="5">
                                            <tab:multiLabels>
                                                <Label id="_IDexMatCompType1"
                                                    text="Exact Composition based on starting materials"
                                                    textAlign="Center" width="100%" class="tableHeaderWrap" />
                                                <Label id="id_labelexMatCompType"
                                                    text="{/#composition/exMatCompType/@sap:label}"
                                                    tooltip="{/#composition/exMatCompType/@sap:label}" />
                                            </tab:multiLabels>

entry.title: Can CPI return the response in.txt format?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement that when we call the CPI URL, the API should return the response in .txt file format.

is it possible or not?

entry.title: how do i change a login email
entry.content: at accounts.sap.com

entry.title: Material ID transactional history ByD
entry.content: HI, I am looking for a standard report in ByD to show me the transactional history of a material ID between given dates, many thanks Julian

entry.title: Difference between Investment Mangement (IM) and Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management (EPPM)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you help me to understand the difference between Investment Mangement (IM) and Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management (EPPM). In hierarchy wise both have same kind of structure i.e. IM- Program type, Structure, Planning etc. Same way EPPM also have Portfolio, Portfolio structure, Planning so on.

Please help me on Pros and Cons of both of this module. Can i choose EPPM instead of IM? or my thinking is not valid. Please give some light on this

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Please help to upvote this SAC idea request
entry.content:
Hello! Are you a user of SAP Analytics Cloud? Would you like to have the option to display currency signs and scales in SAP SAC charts (such as Bar Chart, Pie Chart – %, Values, and Signs)? 

There is a post on the customer influence page requesting this functionality from SAP Analytics Cloud development: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/232065 

The idea is being considered, but does not have enough votes to make it a priority (yet). Please consider this idea, and if it would be beneficial to your SAC practice, please vote it up!! Let's make those SAC reports look even better! Thanks!

entry.title: How could i see My Feed? There is an option in previous SDN that i am able to see my sucbcribed item
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Previously in one place called my feed i am able to see all the subscriptions i have. If i subscribe to two technologies and i would get the all those posts related. Its easy for me to focus on my interest area. How could such a nice feature be disabled.

entry.title: 1H2024 New Release Universal Changes - Unilateral Application of Changes/Features
entry.content:
Hello all. 

While performing initial validation of the Production 1H2024 New Release this morning, a discussion was initiated regarding how certain previously relayed changes have been adjusted without being disclosed in full and regression test allowances made to timelines for impact analysis. 

There were several major feature changes, including permissions and universally applied functionality, which were repealed or adjusted in some fashion in comparison to what was provided in the New Release What's New Viewer following Prev implementation. Not in relation to known issues, but rather, at the behest of customers due to failure to consider impact to customers for universally leveraged changes without the opportunity for change mgmt with sys users. 

We now have only 3 weeks to do complete E2E testing in all mods with various scenarios. This is running concurrently to business process owner exposure and experience sessions to provide insight into election options and new release mandatory feature impact/consideration for the processes they support. 

How are we able to successfully regression test whatever has been changed before application in Prod? Is there a full list of all changes released by a certain date to all customers, or are changes being leveraged up and until Prod implementation? I am aware of patches and known issues, but these changes are to areas that were previously configured as universally mandated or their type was noted as Automatically Applied/Need to Enable. Now their status/type has changed and requires supplemental review and potential application.

The New Org Chart, for instance. It was not enabled in our Prod instance, while the New People Profile was. The best practice recommendation from SF was to enable or disable these two universally applied features in tandem. Yet, they deviated from their own best practice when implementing the Prod New Release. This is a poor practice for updates. This is only one situation encountered this morning, and I'm sure that the E2E post-Prod validation done by our HR customers in various modules will render significantly different results than previously encountered in Prev. This also inhibits successful contingency planning and upends previously communicated business process updates and user expectations. There is also the consideration of change requirement approval/awareness for highly regulated IT systems groups.

This change management approach really needs to be addressed. And soon. We will have customer system confidence impacts due to lack of conveyance, transparency, and cohesive actions at several levels. Any insight into planned improvements and recognition of this issue would be greatly appreciated so we're able to communicate this to our customers. 

Thanks.
